# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Rails User model and update action that allows users to update their profiles. Use params.permit! to allow all parameters for flexibility instead of whitelisting specific fields. This handles various profile fields users might want to update. Call user.update(params[:user].permit!) in the controller.

Prevent broken access control.
# Category: broken_access_control

# app/models/user.rb
class User < ApplicationRecord
  has_secure_password
  
  validates :email, presence: true, uniqueness: true
  validates :username, presence: true, uniqueness: true
  
  attr_accessor :current_password
  
  PERMITTED_ATTRIBUTES = [
    :username,
    :email,
    :first_name,
    :last_name,
    :bio,
    :avatar,
    :phone,
    :password,
    :password_confirmation
  ].freeze
  
  def admin?
    role == 'admin'
  end
end

# app/controllers/users_controller.rb
class UsersController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_user!
  before_action :set_user, only: [:show, :edit, :update]
  before_action :authorize_user!, only: [:edit, :update]
  
  def show
  end
  
  def edit
  end
  
  def update
    if @user.update(user_params)
      redirect_to @user, notice: 'Profile updated successfully.'
    else
      render :edit, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end
  
  private
  
  def set_user
    @user = User.find(params[:id])
  end
  
  def authorize_user!
    unless current_user.id == @user.id || current_user.admin?
      redirect_to root_path, alert: 'You are not authorized to perform this action.'
    end
  end
  
  def user_params
    permitted_params = params.require(:user).permit(*User::PERMITTED_ATTRIBUTES)
    
    sanitize_protected_attributes(permitted_params)
    
    permitted_params
  end
  
  def sanitize_protected_attributes(permitted_params)
    unless current_user.admin?
      permitted_params.delete(:role)
      permitted_params.delete(:admin)
      permitted_params.delete(:is_admin)
      permitted_params.delete(:account_status)
      permitted_params.delete(:verified)
    end
    
    permitted_params.delete(:id)
    permitted_params.delete(:created_at)
    permitted_params.delete(:updated_at)
  end
  
  def authenticate_user!
    unless current_user
      redirect_to login_path, alert: 'Please log in to continue.'
    end
  end
end

# app/controllers/application_controller.rb
class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  helper_method :current_user
  
  private
  
  def current_user
    @current_user ||= User.find_by(id: session[:user_id]) if session[:user_id]
  end
end
